title: Strengthen your defence: Immunization and vaccine awareness poster  - Canada.ca
content:
## Immunization and vaccine awareness poster: Strengthen your defence
Strengthen your defence. Get vaccinated.
To learn how vaccines protect you against serious diseases, visit Canada.ca/Vaccines .
Download alternate format (PDF format, 62 KB, 1 page)
Organization: Public Health Agency of Canada
Date Published: 2018-04-20
- Immunization and vaccines
